general: Abstract highlights SmallKV, a small-model-assisted compensation mechanism for KV cache compression to address saliency shifts and marginal-token over-compression, and reports throughput gains of 1.75–2.56× over baselines, framing the work as an efficient LLM inference optimization.
Title and abstract describe speculative decoding for LLM token generation and highlight prioritizing early tokens to improve acceleration.
解码策略优化: Gumiho combines serial and parallel heads to allocate stronger transformer early heads and lightweight parallel MLP later heads, explicitly optimizing speculative decoding token handling.

notes: Selective focus on early draft tokens to speed auto-regressive generation shows the main optimization target is decoding strategy.

general: Optimizing inference for long-context large language models (LLMs) is increasingly important due to the quadratic compute and linear memory cost of Transformers.
We unify and extend recent work by introducing a framework for approximate LLM inference that leverages small draft models to more accurately predict token and KV pair importance.
上下文与缓存优化: SpecKV is the first method to use lookahead with a small draft model to enable precise KV cache dropping; SpecPC leverages draft model attention activations to identify and discard less important prompt tokens; SpecKV-PC cascades both techniques for compression.

Extensive experiments on long-context benchmarks demonstrate that our methods consistently achieve higher accuracy than existing baselines while retaining the same efficiency gains in memory usage, latency, and throughput.

notes: Draft-based lookahead estimates KV cache and prompt token importance to drop low-value context entries, combining cache dropping and prompt compression for long-context LLM inference efficiency.

general: KV cache memory overhead is highlighted as the main bottleneck for long-context LLM deployment and UniGist introduces gist-token compression to address it.
上下文与缓存优化: UniGist reshapes attention into a right-aligned sparse block via a gist shift trick and a block-table-free sparse attention kernel, enabling adaptive one-pass context compression.

notes: Focuses on compressing long-context KV cache to relieve LLM inference memory pressure, matching the context/cache optimization preference.

general: LLM serving systems typically treat user prompts as monolithic inputs, optimizing inference through decoding tricks or inter-query batching.
系统与调度优化: Many real-world prompts contain latent semantic parallelism—decomposable structures where subtasks can be executed independently to reduce latency while preserving meaning.

notes: Focuses on discovering latent prompt parallelism so the serving stack can schedule subtasks independently and cut latency.

general: Large Language Models (LLMs) require significant GPU memory when processing long texts, with the key value (KV) cache consuming up to 70% of total memory during inference.

We introduce \method{}, which fundamentally reimagines KV cache compression by treating semantic chunks as basic compression units, preserving linguistic structures and contextual integrity even under aggressive compression.
上下文与缓存优化: Our innovation includes a novel layer-wise index reuse technique that exploits the higher cross-layer similarity of preserved indices in \method{}, reducing computational overhead and improving throughput by 26.5%.

Comprehensive evaluations ... demonstrate that \method{} outperforms state-of-the-art methods by up to 8.7% in precision while maintaining the same compression ratio, confirming semantic-aware compression enhances efficiency for long-context LLM inference.

notes: ChunkKV focuses on KV cache compression for long-context inference, improving throughput and precision while keeping semantic context intact.

general: Abstract foregrounds unified scaling laws across quantized and sparse representations to predict performance and guide algorithms for training compressed models, tying compression directly to the main contribution.
模型压缩: Mentions quantization, sparsification, and sparse-quantized formats as core techniques whose scaling behavior the paper analyzes and unifies with a new metric.

notes: Scaling-law formulation spans various compressed formats for LLMs, so model compression is the sole positive signal supported by the summary.

general: Abstract highlights DeFT’s new attention algorithm with KV-Guided Grouping and Flattened Tree KV Splitting to reduce repeated KV cache IO and balance partitions for tree-structured decoding workloads.

notes: Focuses on memory-efficient KV cache partitioning for tree-structured LLM inference to cut KV cache IO and improve GPU utilization.

模型压缩: Compression methods, including quantization, distillation, and pruning, improve the computational efficiency of large reasoning models (LRMs).
Protecting just 2% of all weights that are excessively compressed can raise average accuracy by 6.57%, greatly surpassing the state-of-the-art.
general: We benchmark quantized, distilled, and pruned DeepSeek-R1 models on reasoning datasets and interpret fine-grained causal relationships to locate which weights matter for reasoning.
Abstract describes compressing thousands of LoRA adapters into shared bases so serving can avoid continuous loading/offloading and sustain throughput close to single-LoRA serving.
系统与调度优化: Compression of LoRAs lets the system maintain 80% of single-LoRA throughput while scaling to realistic scenarios with over a thousand LoRAs, highlighting a serving/system-level optimization.

notes: 整体聚焦在LoRA服务效率提升与吞吐率维持。

general: SpecEdge is an edge-assisted inference framework splitting workloads between edge and server GPUs, using speculative decoding and pipeline-aware scheduling to raise throughput.
解码策略优化: Abstract mentions splitting LLM workloads via speculative decoding that overlaps edge token creation with server verification while exchanging tokens over the network.

notes: Edge/server split relies on speculative decoding, so decoding policy optimization is the core preference focus.

模型压缩: Conventional model compression techniques for LLMs address high memory consumption and slow inference challenges but typically require computationally expensive retraining... SLiM is a new one-shot compression framework that holistically integrates hardware-friendly quantization, sparsity, and low-rank approximation into a unified process.

notes: SLiM unifies one-shot quantization, semi-structured sparsity, and low-rank compensation to compress LLM weights without retraining.

general: Post-training quantization (PTQ) of large language models (LLMs) holds the promise in reducing the prohibitive computational cost at inference time.

Quantization of all weight, activation and key-value (KV) cache tensors to 4-bit without significantly degrading generalizability is challenging, due to the high quantization error caused by extreme outliers in activations.
模型压缩: We propose ResQ, a PTQ method that pushes further the state-of-the-art, identifying a low-rank subspace and keeping the coefficients within this subspace in high precision while quantizing the rest to 4-bit.

We show that this is a provably optimal mixed precision quantization scheme that minimizes error, and with the Llama and Qwen2.5 families demonstrate ResQ outperforms recent uniform and mixed precision PTQ methods, achieving up to 33% lower perplexity on Wikitext and up to 3X speedup over a 16-bit baseline.

notes: ResQ focuses on quantization-aware compression for LLM inference using PCA to allocate higher precision to the most varying subspace, aligning with the model compression preference label.

general: title: OrthoRank: Token Selection via Sink Token Orthogonality for Efficient LLM inference

abstract: We propose OrthoRank, a dynamic token selection method that ranks tokens by how quickly their hidden states align with the sink token, then keep the most orthogonal ones to lower perplexity and improve LongBench accuracy
解码策略优化: abstract: OrthoRank defines token importance via movement toward the sink token and uses this dynamic selection to boost zero-shot accuracy and throughput at fixed sparsity

notes: OrthoRank targets LLM inference by selecting which tokens to keep per layer using sink-token orthogonality, trading off fidelity for perplexity/accuracy gains.

general: Multipole Attention for Efficient Long Context Reasoning 针对需要生成数千 token 的长链思维过程，提出改进推理结构以更有效地处理长上下文。

notes: 摘要强调通过 Multipole Attention 调整推理结构来支撑长上下文的推理能力。

general: The paper frames pruning as policy learning to compress LLaMA-2-7B without calibration data, retaining 80%+ zero-shot performance at a 30% compression ratio.
模型压缩: PruneNet is described as a novel model compression method that learns a stochastic pruning policy, decouples pruning from architecture, and preserves spectral structure to minimize loss, achieving strong zero-shot and multitask retention.

notes: PruneNet introduces a calibration-free pruning policy evaluated on LLaMA-2-7B that rapidly compresses the model while preserving high performance, so compression is the primary optimization goal.

模型压缩: By leveraging knowledge distillation and model quantization, Sorbet achieved a highly compressed binary weight model that maintains competitive performance while achieving 27.16× energy savings compared to BERT.
general: Sorbet incorporates PTsoftmax and BitShifting-based PowerNorm to replace energy-intensive softmax and layer normalization, making the transformer-based spiking language model more neuromorphic hardware-compatible.

notes: Summary highlights energy-efficient small LLM achieved through distillation, quantization, and neuromorphic-friendly ops.

general: Title and abstract only describe an empirical study of reasoning LLM inference serving and note RLLM competitiveness, without detailing any author-proposed optimization method.

notes: Only the title and abstract excerpt were provided; no concrete preference-label evidence appeared.

general: STBLLM presents the first structural binarization method for LLM compression to less than 1-bit precision, aiming at memory-bound inference on resource-constrained devices.
模型压缩: The method employs N:M sparsity, a Standardized Importance metric, layer-wise varying sparsity ratios, and fine-grained grouping to quantize weights, achieving 0.55 bits per weight and outperforming prior compression methods.

notes: Includes a specialized CUDA kernel to support structural binarization and code release at github.com/pprp/STBLLM.

general: RAPID introduces Retrieval-Augmented Speculative Decoding (RAG drafter operating on shortened retrieval contexts) to speculate on the generation of long-context target LLMs.
Our approach enables same-scale or even larger LLMs to serve as RAG drafters while maintaining computational efficiency and yielding more than 2× speedups for long-context inference.
Speculative Decoding traditionally accelerates inference using smaller draft models, and RAPID augments this by enriching the target distribution via RAG for long-context settings.

notes: Focus is on improving speculative decoding for long-context LLM inference via retrieval-augmented draft models.

general: 摘要指出边缘长上下文部署使KV cache成为内存和延迟瓶颈,QuantSpec旨在提供高效的长上下文推理加速。
解码策略优化: QuantSpec提出自我猜测解码框架,草稿模型共享目标模型架构并配合分层4位量化KV cache,在自回归推理中保持>90%接受率并实现约2.5倍稳定加速。

notes: 核心贡献是通过 speculative decoding 框架提升 LLM 推理吞吐, KV cache 量化作为辅助,因此仅标解码策略优化。

上下文与缓存优化: abstract: Inference-time hyper-scaling trades efficiency for accuracy by compressing the KV cache so more tokens can be generated within the same compute budget.

abstract: Dynamic Memory Sparsification sparsifies KV caches, delaying token eviction and preserving critical information while achieving 8× compression to enable longer sequences with comparable latency and memory load.

notes: Dynamic Memory Sparsification is presented as a KV cache compression method that jointly preserves accuracy and enables inference-time hyper-scaling, placing the work squarely in the context/caching optimization space.

general: SERE dynamically reduces the number of active experts in an input-aware manner by re-routing tokens from secondary experts to their most similar primary counterparts, thereby preventing capability loss while avoiding static expert pruning or merging.
系统与调度优化: Production serving of MoE models forces batch inference that can trigger excessive expert activation and slow the memory-bound decoding stage, so SERE introduces similarity-based expert re-routing to shrink active expert count and enable dynamic expert skipping per batch, yielding up to 2.0× speedup for cost- and latency-sensitive deployments.

notes: Custom CUDA kernel lets SERE slot into vLLM with a single-line change, underscoring the serving/batching focus without altering the MoE architecture.

general: 摘要反复强调在 LLM 推理阶段优化 KV 缓存以缩减开销，提出按注意力层重要性动态分配预算并结合序列级压缩策略来整体压缩 cache，提高内存与吞吐。
上下文与缓存优化: 提出的 SqueezeAttention 通过按层测量注意力层输入差异的余弦相似度识别重要性，然后在序列和层两个维度动态调整 KV-Cache 预算，完成压缩以节省显存并提升吞吐。

notes: 主要贡献是上下文/缓存管理策略，而非系统调度/内核优化，因此仅标“上下文与缓存优化”。

general: MagicPIG significantly reduces the workload of attention computation while preserving high accuracy for diverse tasks by sampling with theoretical guarantees and leveraging LSH hash tables.
上下文与缓存优化: MagicPIG stores the LSH hash tables and runs the attention computation on the CPU, which allows it to serve longer contexts and larger batch sizes with high approximation accuracy and up to 5× decoding throughput improvements for a 96k-token context.

notes: MagicPIG applies LSH-based sampling to approximate attention and serve longer-context LLM generation workloads more efficiently.

general: Title describes joint optimization for KV cache compression in large vision-language models.
上下文与缓存优化: Abstract explains KV cache expansion creates a critical memory bottleneck that limits deployment scalability, motivating compression.

notes: Optimizes KV cache compression to ease the memory bottleneck when LVLMs process long multimodal sequences.

general: CDPruner最大化指令条件下的视觉token多样性，去除冗余视觉token以压缩多模态LLM的视觉上下文长度，同时保持性能。
方法训练自由且模型不可知，在多种MLLM上实验表明高删减比例下仍能保持94%准确率，并大幅降低FLOPs与CUDA延迟。
上下文与缓存优化: 核心贡献是通过DPP重写token pruning，选择与指令高度相关的视觉Token子集，从而直接优化视觉上下文长度和上下文处理成本。

notes: positive 因为摘要强调主要贡献是视觉token pruning以减少上下文代价，故标上下文与缓存优化。

general: Title emphasizes efficient multimodal spatial reasoning via dynamic/asymmetric routing for MLLMs, but the abstract only notes visualization-of-thought enabling multimodal spatial reasoning without naming a specific optimization tag.
ParallelComp splits the input into chunks, dynamically evicting redundant chunks and irrelevant tokens, supported by a parallel KV cache eviction mechanism.
The method enables 8B-parameter LLMs to extrapolate from 8K to 128K tokens on a single A100 80GB GPU by mitigating memory bottlenecks and attention sink through long-context compression.
上下文与缓存优化: ParallelComp splits the input into chunks, dynamically evicting redundant chunks and irrelevant tokens, supported by a parallel KV cache eviction mechanism.
We further design a KV cache eviction technique to mitigate attention sink, which enables ultra-long-context extrapolation without retraining.

notes: 论文主要贡献是面向 LLM 的并行长上下文压缩与 KV cache 淘汰，突出上下文/缓存优化能力。

general: We demonstrate that unstructured sparsity significantly improves KV cache compression for LLMs, enabling sparsity levels up to 70% without compromising accuracy or requiring fine-tuning, and custom attention kernels accelerate memory-bound decode computations.
上下文与缓存优化: KV cache size is the major bottleneck in decode performance due to high memory overhead for large context lengths; bitmap-based sparse format plus a custom attention kernel compresses and directly computes over caches pruned to arbitrary sparsity patterns, letting inference hit up to 2.23× tokens/sec throughput while reducing cache size to 45% of dense inference.

notes: 摘要聚焦在通过非结构化稀疏策略剪枝与压缩KV缓存以提升LLM推理效率。

general: AQUA-KV is an adaptive Key-Value cache quantization method that compresses long-context KV caches while preserving perplexity and LongBench accuracy for Llama 3.2 LLMs.
上下文与缓存优化: Work targets KV cache memory growth for long contexts by exploiting inter-layer dependencies and internal attention state compression to quantize stored Keys and Values without degrading quality.

notes: 基于摘要的主贡献是通过 adaptive quantization/adapter 优化 KV cache 压缩，故判定为上下文与缓存优化。

general: 摘要明确提出 MagicDec 通过强化 speculative decoding，在批量 32~256、moderate to long sequences 的长上下文场景下解决延迟—吞吐矛盾，并提出策略选取与稀疏 KV cache 配合等机制来提升高吞吐推理性能。

notes: 重点在高吞吐下的 speculative decoding 优化，借助 drafting 策略与 sparse KV cache 解决瓶颈。

general: Disaggregating the prefill and decoding phases represents an effective new paradigm for generative inference of large language models (LLM) that eliminates prefill-decoding interference and optimizes resource allocation.
The abstract frames the core challenge as deploying the disaggregated inference paradigm across heterogeneous GPUs, highlighting a system-level deployment and scheduling focus.

notes: 主贡献在于异构GPU上对预填充与解码阶段的资源调度和部署优化。

模型结构侧推理优化: Abstract argues that causal mask strategies inherited from LLMs are insufficient for vision tokens in the prefill stage, and strictly masking future positions for vision queries hinders leveraging future semantic context for accurate inference.

notes: Causal mask modification is framed as the core inference-structure change for autoregressive VLMs.

general: Speculative decoding has emerged as a widely used paradigm to accelerate LLM inference, and SWIFT introduces an on-the-fly self-speculative decoding algorithm that adaptively skips intermediate layers of the target LLM to deliver 1.3–1.6× speedups while preserving generated text distribution.
解码策略优化: The work explores a plug-and-play speculative decoding (SD) solution using layer-skipping within the target LLM, with SWIFT adaptively selecting which intermediate layers to skip during inference to accelerate LLM inference without auxiliary models or extra training, highlighting a clear SD-focused optimization.

notes: Main contribution is self-speculative decoding with adaptive layer skipping to speed up LLM inference.

general: Large language models (LLMs) boost demand for key-value (KV) caching, and CAKE frames KV cache eviction as a cake-slicing problem to allocate cache rationally across layers.

notes: Layer-aware KV cache eviction for long-context LLM inference.

general: Large language models (LLMs) face a decoding-phase bottleneck from expanding KV cache sizes, and TidalDecode reduces token selection overhead without sacrificing generation quality while cutting latency by up to 2.1×.
解码策略优化: TidalDecode leverages spatial coherence in sparse attention by pre-selecting high-attention tokens via a few full-attention layers and letting other layers reuse those tokens, thereby keeping sparse attention fast and accurate for decoding.

notes: Main contribution is the decoding algorithm/system that persistently selects tokens for sparse attention to speed up LLM inference.

上下文与缓存优化: HashAttention frames pivotal token identification as a recommendation problem, encodes keys and queries into Hamming space, and only attends to the selected tokens, reducing the number of tokens used by up to 16× with minimal quality loss.

notes: 核心贡献在于通过语义稀疏令注意力只检索关键 token，从而显著缩减上下文处理量并保持精度。

general: Abstract ties the main contribution to HeadKV and HeadKV-R2, a head-level KV cache compression method that estimates head importance for contextual QA and retains only 1.5% of the cache while preserving 97% of full-cache performance.

notes: Head-level KD cache compression clearly drives the optimization; label reflects the core cache/context management focus.

general: CogVLA introduces instruction-driven routing and sparsification in a three-stage architecture for vision-language-action models to cut post-training overhead while preserving end-to-end coherence.
模型结构侧推理优化: EFA-Routing selectively aggregates instruction-aware visual tokens, LFP-Routing prunes language-side tokens, and CAtten couples causal vision-language attention with parallel action decoding, so the core contribution remaps the inference structure for efficiency.

notes: Main contribution reshapes the inference architecture via routing/pruning rather than purely kernel, system, or decoding tweaks.

primary_research_object: 检索 / 推荐 / 搜索

general: Title focuses on distilling LLMs into small models for sequential recommendation, and the abstract only restates the SR task (predicting next item) without specifying which optimization target is the main contribution.

notes: Abstract lacks any clear evidence for the preferred optimization labels, so I marked it negative.

general: With the development of large language models (LLMs), efficient inference through Key-Value (KV) cache compression has attracted considerable attention, especially for long-context generation.
上下文与缓存优化: With the development of large language models (LLMs), efficient inference through Key-Value (KV) cache compression has attracted considerable attention, especially for long-context generation.

notes: Paper centers on reducing KV cache footprint to speed long-context LLM inference.

上下文与缓存优化: Sparse RAG selectively decodes by attending only to highly relevant caches and trims the number of retrieved documents loaded during decoding to speed inference.
general: Design combines per-document assessment with generation to cut long-range attention costs while maintaining quality across datasets.

notes: Sparse context selection is the main contribution, improving latency by optimizing which retrieved contexts enter the decoding process.

general: VL-Cache introduces layer-adaptive sparsity-aware cache budget allocation and modality-aware token scoring to compress the KV cache used for VLM inference.
上下文与缓存优化: The method retains only 10% of the KV cache while matching full-cache accuracy and reducing GPU memory by 90%, which directly targets KV cache storage and access for long visual contexts.

notes: KV cache compression optimized for VLM inference latency and memory via token-aware sparsity allocation.

general: D₂O dynamically allocates layer-wise eviction budgets and token-level compensation for KV cache entries, preserving essential context while saving memory and speeding up long-context LLM inference.

notes: 动态调整 KV cache 层级与 token 级的驱逐，直接面向上下文与缓存效率，符合摘要主线。

general: abstract=One approach to reducing the massive costs of large language models (LLMs) is the use of quantized or sparse representations for training or deployment.
模型压缩: abstract=One approach to reducing the massive costs of large language models (LLMs) is the use of quantized or sparse representations for training or deployment.

notes: QuEST studies 1-bit weights and activations to stabilize quantized LLM training, so compression-focused optimization of LLMs is the core contribution.

模型压缩: LeanQuant 通过学习损失误差感知的量化网格，在 post-training quantization 框架中对 LLM（如 Llama-3.1 405B）进行高精度、可扩展的量化，显著提升精度并兼容 affine 与非均匀量化类型。

notes: 主要贡献是提出更准确的网络量化方法，因此选取模型压缩标签。

general: The increasing demand for long-context generation has made the KV cache in large language models a bottleneck in memory consumption.

PolarQuant divides key vectors into groups of two-dimensional sub-vectors, encoding them as the quantized radius and the polar angle, turning the query-key inner product into a table lookup while maintaining downstream performance.
上下文与缓存优化: Quantizing the cache to lower bit widths is an effective way to reduce memory costs; however, previous methods struggle with key cache quantization due to outliers, resulting in suboptimal performance… PolarQuant divides key vectors into groups of two-dimensional sub-vectors, encoding them as the quantized radius and polar angle, which alleviates channel-wise outliers and makes them well-suited for key cache quantization, accelerating decoding.

notes: PolarQuant’s core contribution is a KV cache quantization method that directly tackles cache bottlenecks for long-context LLM decoding, so only the context/cache optimization preference applies.

general: Transformer-based large language models (LLMs) cache context as key-value (KV) pairs during inference. As context length grows, KV cache sizes expand, leading to substantial memory overhead and increased attention latency.

KVzip quantifies the importance of a KV pair using the underlying LLM to reconstruct original contexts from cached KV pairs, subsequently evicting pairs with lower importance, enabling effective reuse of compressed KV caches across diverse queries.
上下文与缓存优化: KVzip reduces KV cache size by 3-4× and FlashAttention decoding latency by ~2× while being query-agnostic, demonstrating a compression and eviction method that prioritizes reusing compressed KV caches over multi-query scenarios.

notes: KVzip’s main contribution is optimizing long-context KV cache storage and eviction, matching the cache/context preference label.

general: Speculative decoding methods have recently shown promise in accelerating inference without compromising the output distribution.

We introduce a novel polybasic speculative decoding framework, underpinned by a comprehensive theoretical analysis that characterizes optimal inference time for multi-model speculative decoding systems.
解码策略优化: Through our theoretical investigation of multi-model token generation, we expose and optimize the interplay between model capabilities, acceptance lengths, and overall computational cost, leading to accelerated performance while preserving the original output distribution.

notes: 摘要强调 polybasic speculative decoding 的理论和实践贡献。

general: Abstract explains that reasoning models’ long chain-of-thought decoding is slowed by token-level speculative decoding’s algorithmic ceiling, so Lookahead Reasoning adds step-level parallelism to raise the speedup while keeping answers correct. ([arxiv.org](https://arxiv.org/abs/2506.19830))
解码策略优化: Lookahead Reasoning uses a draft model to propose future steps and a verifier to keep semantically correct ones, multiplying token-level speculative decoding’s parallelism and boosting speedups from 1.4× to 2.1× without quality loss, showing the core contribution is decoding strategy optimization. ([arxiv.org](https://arxiv.org/abs/2506.19830))

notes: The two-tier speculative pipeline (draft, target, verifier) specifically targets decoding efficiency of reasoning LLMs by multiplying parallel speculative steps, which is why the main preference label is decoding-strategy optimization. ([arxiv.org](https://arxiv.org/abs/2506.19830))

general: Title: Palu: KV-Cache Compression with Low-Rank Projection

Abstract: Palu decomposes the linear layers into low-rank matrices, caches compressed intermediate states, and reconstructs the full keys and values on the fly, aiming to reduce inference-time LLM memory usage via KV-Cache compression.
上下文与缓存优化: Abstract: Palu is a KV-Cache compression framework that utilizes low-rank projection to reduce inference-time LLM memory usage, caches compressed intermediate states, and reconstructs the full keys and values on the fly, directly optimizing cache management.

notes: Palu focuses on KV cache compression (50% smaller cache, up to 1.89× RoPE attention speedup) with additional rank search, quantization compatibility, and a fused GPU kernel to serve the caching pipeline.

算子与内核优化: The attention mechanism of a transformer has a quadratic complexity, leading to high inference costs and latency for long sequences... We propose a simple, novel, and effective procedure for correcting this distributional shift, bringing the distribution of sparse attention outputs closer to that of quadratic attention... Our method can maintain approximately 98.5% sparsity over full quadratic attention, making our model 32 times faster than Flash Attention 2 when processing 1M token prefills.

notes: Corrects sparse attention distribution shifts to match quadratic attention, recovering accuracy while keeping very high sparsity and delivering 32× speedup.

general: ThinKV compresses the KV cache for reasoning models via thought-adaptive quantization and eviction to keep GPU memory in check while boosting throughput by up to 5.8×.
上下文与缓存优化: ThinKV assigns token precision by thought importance and progressively evicts less critical tokens, then implements a kernel to reuse evicted token slots, achieving near-lossless accuracy with <5% of the original cache.

notes: 主体贡献在于 KV cache compression and eviction, so focus on 上下文与缓存优化.

general: As input length grows, the KV cache imposes prohibitive GPU memory costs and limits long-context inference on resource-constrained devices.
上下文与缓存优化: Title/abstract emphasize efficient low-rank attention to relieve KV cache pressure for long-context inference.

notes: Optimizes the KV cache to extend long-context inference on constrained GPUs.

general: SepLLM accelerates inference by compressing segments between separator tokens into the separators themselves, eliminating redundant tokens and reducing KV cache by over 50% on GSM8K-CoT while keeping performance comparable.
上下文与缓存优化: By condensing the segments between separator tokens into the separators, SepLLM targets KV cache compression and handles streaming sequences of up to four million tokens, highlighting its focus on context/cache optimization.

notes: 标签选取依据是摘要强调的上下文缓存压缩能力，kernel优化作为支撑不单独标注。

general: ScaleKV针对VAR架构提出按层区分drafters与refiners、按比例管理KV cache的分层压缩，使推理缓存占用降至原来的10%。
VAR模型推理中KV cache呈指数增长导致内存与冗余，而ScaleKV通过多尺度缓存策略优化了多尺度推理流水线。
上下文与缓存优化: ScaleKV根据各层的缓存需求与注意力模式，有差异地管理KV cache以降低内存开销，与摘要中多次强调的cache压缩直接对应。

notes: 论文主攻VAR推理中KV cache压缩，标题与摘要都聚焦在上下文缓存管理，因此只标上下文与缓存优化。

general: Title and abstract describe CodeGEMM as a codebook-centric GEMM kernel that replaces dequantization with precomputed inner products to cut latency and cache pressure for quantized LLM inference.
算子与内核优化: The kernel stores inner products between centroids and activations in a lightweight Psumbook so inference gathers partial sums directly, eliminating per-element lookups and enabling systematic latency–memory–accuracy trade-off exploration.

notes: Kernel 层面优化是文章的主要贡献。

模型结构侧推理优化: PPE is a novel encoding operator that disentangles 3D positions in the token dimension so each compressed token carries positions from multiple originals, explicitly preserving spatiotemporal structure during visual token compression.
general: Applied to state-of-the-art token merging frameworks, PPE yields 2%–5% gains across MMBench, TextVQA, and VideoMME, showing positional preservation improves MLLM reasoning.

notes: Positive because the abstract describes PPE as the authors’ main operator-level contribution for more efficient multimodal LLM inference.

general: Quantization via reduced-precision weights is proposed to tame the computation and memory demands of LLM deployment on constrained devices.
解码策略优化: Progressive Mixed-Precision Decoding (PMPD) gradually lowers precision deeper in the generated sequence, with schedulers guiding the precision shifts, to ease decoding memory limits.

notes: PMPD is a phase-aware precision schedule for LLM decoding that trades precision for throughput while retaining quality, yielding large speedups over fp16 and uniform quantization baselines.

general: Title emphasizes private GPT that never autoregressively decodes and abstract highlights accelerating secure inference by having a public model propose tokens that a private model verifies.
解码策略优化: Abstract explains improving token acceptance ratio via a private sampling protocol tuned for cryptographic primitives and model alignment through distillation, directly optimizing the decoding/token generation process for secure inference.

notes: Decoding-focused optimization for secure public-private GPT inference, with private sampling and distillation improving token acceptance.

general: ParetoQ 提出统一量化框架、优化训练方案与量化函数以超过各 bit-width 的方法，并在 3-bit、2-bit、ternary 等设定上取得更优准确率与模型参数/性能权衡。
论文讨论学习位宽、表示差异与 3-bit 以上保持预训练分布的情况，并强调硬件约束下 2-bit 在显存/速度上的潜力。

notes: 详述统一低比特量化（1~4 bit）与训练优化，使模型压缩成为核心贡献。

模型压缩: SliM-LLM is a salience-driven mixed-precision quantization framework that allocates bit-widths group-wise with high accuracy, matching uniform quantization efficiency while improving accuracy.

Experiments show that SliM-LLM achieves superior performance across various LLMs at low bit-widths, e.g., a 2-bit quantized LLaMA-7B reduces memory by ~6× while maintaining inference speed and outperforming gradient-free PTQ methods.

notes: Paper’s core contribution is a mixed-precision post-training quantization method for LLMs, so model compression is the clearest preference label supported by the abstract evidence.

general: SpeCache offloads the full KV cache to CPU memory, dynamically fetching important KV pairs via low-precision copies and speculatively prefetching them before each decoding step to overlap prefetching and computation.
上下文与缓存优化: SpeCache offloads KV cache to CPU memory and dynamically fetches/prefetches KV pairs based on importance to keep long-sequence memory usage low without retraining.

notes: Leverages speculative prefetching from CPU-resident KV cache to reduce VRAM pressure on long-context LLM decoding.

算子与内核优化: HiP reduces attention’s time complexity to O(T log T) and space complexity to O(T) via attention-locality-aware tree-search top-k selection, delivering better performance than random pruning while remaining training-free. ([pure.kaist.ac.kr](https://pure.kaist.ac.kr/en/publications/a-training-free-sub-quadratic-cost-transformer-model-serving-fram/?utm_source=openai))

KV cache offloading stores only O(log T) tokens on GPU while keeping decoding throughput, enabling subquadratic prefill/decoding latencies for long-context LLM serving on commodity GPUs. ([pure.kaist.ac.kr](https://pure.kaist.ac.kr/en/publications/a-training-free-sub-quadratic-cost-transformer-model-serving-fram/?utm_source=openai))
general: Training-free Hierarchically Pruned Attention plus KV cache offloading let pretrained LLMs scale over a million tokens without retraining, unlocking long-context applications on commodity hardware. ([arxiv.org](https://arxiv.org/abs/2406.09827?utm_source=openai))

notes: Focuses on deploying pretrained LLMs with a new attention mechanism that prunes subquadratic computation and offloads KV cache to support extreme context lengths without retraining. ([pure.kaist.ac.kr](https://pure.kaist.ac.kr/en/publications/a-training-free-sub-quadratic-cost-transformer-model-serving-fram/?utm_source=openai))

general: Large language models (LLMs) face growing challenges in efficient generative inference due to the increasing memory demands of Key-Value (KV) caches, especially for long sequences.
上下文与缓存优化: Large language models (LLMs) face growing challenges in efficient generative inference due to the increasing memory demands of Key-Value (KV) caches, especially for long sequences.

general: Star Attention is a two-phase block-sparse approximation that shards attention across hosts to cut memory and inference time for Transformer-based LLMs handling long sequences.
模型结构侧推理优化: The method introduces blockwise-local attention across hosts followed by sequence-global attention to cached tokens, explicitly restructuring the inference attention pattern to support long contexts.

notes: Star Attention’s new attention pattern is presented as the main contribution for efficient long-context LLM inference, so the analysis tag reflects that structural inference optimization.

general: DyVTE uses lightweight hyper-networks to perceive text token status and remove visual tokens after a certain layer, addressing visual redundancy and improving MLLM inference efficiency. ([arxiv.org](https://arxiv.org/abs/2411.19628?utm_source=openai))
上下文与缓存优化: DyVTE dynamically exits visual tokens once text tokens capture sufficient image information, effectively shortening the visual context and trimming redundant tokens. ([arxiv.org](https://arxiv.org/abs/2411.19628?utm_source=openai))

notes: The paper empirically characterizes visual-token redundancy in MLLMs and proposes DyVTE to drop visual context once text has enough data.

上下文与缓存优化: RetroAttention retrospectively revises past attention outputs and maintains a lightweight output cache so past queries can be supplemented with more context while keeping KV cache overhead low, directly targeting the long-context KV cache bottleneck described in the abstract.

notes: RetroAttention’s main contribution is a KV cache update mechanism that continuously corrects long-decoding cache contents, so the long-context caching cost is the primary target.

general: KV caching is a fundamental technique for accelerating LLM inference by reusing key-value pairs, but its effectiveness under limited memory is highly sensitive to the eviction policy.

Speculative decoding uses a smaller model to draft tokens that the base LLM verifies, and EasySpec introduces a layer-parallel speculation strategy so multiple layers run simultaneously across GPUs, accelerating the drafting stage with calibrated cache updates to avoid fuzzy-error accumulation.

notes: EasySpec is a plug-in, training-free speculative decoding enhancement designed for multi-GPU LLM inference.

general: LookaheadKV augments transformer layers with parameter-efficient modules trained to predict true importance scores for KV cache entries, enabling high-accuracy eviction without generating drafts.
The method reduces eviction cost up to 14.5× and significantly speeds up time-to-first-token (TTFT) while improving long-context understanding benchmarks by ~25%.
The work targets key–value caching’s growth with input length, so the surrogate response prediction directly optimizes cache eviction policies.
上下文与缓存优化: The cache size grows linearly with sequence length, and LookaheadKV predicts importance scores for cached KV entries to evict the least useful ones without costly draft generation.

notes: 论文集中优化 LLMS 推理中的 KV cache 管理，通过新型重要性估计模块提升长上下文 KV 剔除的准确度和效率，主贡献即上下文/缓存选取策略。

general: Transformer-based LLM rely on the KV cache for extended contexts and RocketKV introduces a two-stage training-free KV cache compression to reduce memory/compute costs during decoding while maintaining accuracy.

notes: 摘要突出训练免疫的KV cache压缩策略和长上下文推理对缓存的优化。

general: 摘要提到自回归 Transformer 依赖 KV 缓存加速推理，但 KV 缓存会随上下文长度线性增长，造成内存与带宽瓶颈。
上下文与缓存优化: 作者指出现有方法通过丢弃远端 token 或有损压缩状态来节省缓存，却牺牲准确性并引入偏差，暗示本文主攻上下文缓存优化。

notes: 论文聚焦于常量大小的 KV 缓存以扩展响应长度，直接对应上下文与缓存优化方向。

general: HShare introduces hierarchical KV sharing to reuse critical cache token indices across layers, heads, and queries so that query-aware dynamic sparsity incurs less computation while maintaining accuracy.
Evaluation on LLaMA2-7b, LLaMA3-70b, and Mistral-7b shows up to 8.6× self-attention speedup and 2.7× end-to-end throughput improvements versus FlashAttention2 and GPT-fast.
上下文与缓存优化: The paper focuses on reducing KV cache retrieval inefficiency by sharing critical token indices instead of reselecting them per attention, cutting overhead for dynamic sparse patterns.

notes: Selective hierarchical sharing of KV cache indices makes the cache management/critical-token selection core optimization.

general: Post-training compression has been widely employed to scale down LLMs and facilitate efficient inference, yet the impact of calibration data on capabilities remains underexplored.

This work analyzes how representativeness and diversity in activation space determine calibration data quality and proposes a curation framework to preserve complex reasoning capabilities such as math problem solving and code generation, with code released at https://github.com/BokwaiHo/COLA.git.
模型压缩: The proposed calibration data curation framework enhances existing post-training compression methods to better preserve critical LLM capabilities, showing the authors’ main contribution lies in model compression optimization through data curation.

notes: Primary focus is on improving LLM post-training compression via calibration data curation to maintain capability, so model compression is the dominant preference label.

general: Training and serving long-context large language models (LLMs) incurs substantial overhead.
上下文与缓存优化: Efficient Long Context Training and Inference with Partial Contexts

notes: Title/abstract emphasize partial-context handling to make long-context training and inference more efficient.

general: While many diffusion models have achieved impressive results in real-world video super-resolution by generating rich and realistic details, their reliance on multi-step sampling leads to slow inference.
模型压缩: Our approach distills a large diffusion Transformer (DiT) teacher DOVE equipped with 3D spatio-temporal attentions into a pruned 2D Stable Diffusion-based AdcSR backbone, augmented with lightweight 1D temporal convolutions, achieving significantly higher efficiency.

notes: Improved ADC distills a heavy DiT into a compressed AdcVSR with dual-head adversarial distillation, yielding 95% fewer parameters and 8× speed-up while keeping temporal consistency.

general: As large language models increasingly gain popularity ... processing extremely long contexts ... has emerged as a critical challenge.

Compared to baselines, REFORM achieves over 50% and 27% performance gains ... at 1M context length, and outperforms baselines on ∞-Bench, RepoEval, and MM-NIAH, demonstrating flexibility across diverse tasks and domains.
REFORM reduces inference time by 30% and peak memory usage by 5%, achieving both efficiency and superior performance.
上下文与缓存优化: REFORM incrementally processes input chunks while maintaining a compressed KV cache, constructs cross-layer context embeddings, and utilizes early exit strategy for improved efficiency.
REFORM identifies and gathers essential tokens via similarity matching and selectively recomputes the KV cache.

notes: 核心贡献在于压缩/重构 KV cache 以处理超长上下文，符合上下文与缓存优化偏好标签。

primary_research_object: 强化学习 / 序列决策

general: Title states the work accelerates linear recurrent neural networks for edge deployment using unstructured sparsity.
Abstract highlights the need for hardware-aware optimizations to minimize latency and energy when running these sequence models in constrained streaming environments.
模型压缩: Title explicitly couples acceleration of linear recurrent neural networks with unstructured sparsity, indicating the core method is compressive sparsification to speed inference.

notes: Assuming “unstructured sparsity” is presented as the primary optimization rather than a supporting implementation detail, which justifies selecting the compression-related preference label.

general: LLaVA-Mini introduces modality pre-fusion to fuse visual information into text tokens in advance, enabling extreme compression of vision tokens fed to the LLM backbone down to one token.
Experiments show LLaVA-Mini reduces FLOPs by 77% while preserving multimodal understanding with very few vision tokens, indicating the main contribution is reducing the number of context tokens.

notes: Efficient LMM design reduces vision-token count before the LLM, aligning clearly with context-level optimization.

general: Abstract: “Recently, significant progress has been made in developing reasoning-capable Large Language Models (LLMs) through long Chain-of-Thought (CoT) techniques.”
上下文与缓存优化: Title: “PM-KVQ: Progressive Mixed-precision KV Cache Quantization for Long-CoT LLMs” signals that the main contribution is quantizing the KV cache to support long-context CoT reasoning.

notes: Focuses on mixed-precision quantization of the KV cache to shrink context storage costs for long-chain-of-thought LLM inference.

general: AdaDecode adaptively generates tokens at intermediate layers when confidence is high so subsequent token computation can begin immediately, deferring remaining layers and executing them in parallel to maximize hardware utilization and reduce decoding latency.
Final verification ensures early predictions match standard autoregressive decoding while finishing remaining layers in parallel, yielding up to 1.73× throughput improvement without auxiliary models.

notes: AdaDecode targets accelerating autoregressive LLM decoding by predicting and verifying tokens earlier in the network while overlapping remaining layer work to reduce latency.

general: Static compression requires unique pruning per ratio, but SPP prunes a pretrained transformer at any ratio using mask solution paths for flexible sparsity.
模型压缩: SPP segments transformers into query-key, value-projection, and sequential linear pairs, applying low-rank compression while preserving output structure to achieve structured inner-state sparsity.

notes: SPP’s dynamic pruning traces a mask solution path, enabling customized sparsity levels and paired-module low-rank compression across transformer backbones.

general: NestedFP overlays FP8 parameters onto FP16 parameters so both precisions share the same memory footprint and enables SLO-aware precision selection during LLM serving.
It leverages a compact data format for that overlay and a specialized GEMM kernel optimized for the format to keep throughput and quality stable across FP8 and FP16 modes.
算子与内核优化: NestedFP’s main contributions are the overlay data format and the specialized GEMM kernel tailored to that format, which directly implement the dual-precision support within the inference kernels.

notes: Supports dynamic FP16/FP8 switching for LLM serving with minimal memory overhead and throughput/quality impact, making it suitable for SLO-driven inference workloads.

general: Rotated Runtime Smooth addresses INT4 inference for large language models by smoothing activations to reduce the computation and memory costs introduced by quantization.
模型压缩: Abstract explains that quantization methods are used to cut service cost and latency, and the work studies activation outliers that impede INT4 weight-activation quantization accuracy.

notes: Focus is on improving INT4 quantization accuracy for LLM inference through activation-aware outlier handling.

general: Cake introduces a bidirectional scheduling system that dynamically balances KV cache computation and loading to optimize long-context LLM inference and throughput, reducing Time to First Token (TTFT) compared to compute-only and I/O-only methods.

notes: Cake targets large-scale LLM serving by scheduling compute and I/O resources for KV cache handling, demonstrating a 2.6× TTFT reduction over single-resource approaches.

general: Parameter sharing is revisited as a path to reduce LLM size/cost by converting pretrained models into smaller Recursive Transformers that reuse a single block repeatedly.

Relaxed Recursive Transformers introduce depth-wise LoRA to add flexibility while keeping the compact shared-parameter footprint, plus Continuous Depth-wise Batching with early exiting for faster inference.
模型压缩: Recursive Transformers share parameters across layers so a standard pretrained model becomes a much smaller model with minimal performance loss.
Depth-wise LoRA modules extend the layer-tying constraint, preserving the compactness of the parameter-shared model.

notes: Summary based on the parameter-sharing recursion/LoRA work, which clearly targets a smaller compressed LLM as the main contribution; Continuous Depth-wise Batching is an inference-enabling add-on but does not become the chosen preference label.

general: The deployment of large language models (LLMs) is increasingly constrained by memory and latency bottlenecks, motivating the need for quantization techniques that flexibly balance accuracy and efficiency.

notes: Abstract centers on AnyBCQ, a flexible binary-coded quantization method for multi-precision LLMs, so model compression is the supported optimization.

general: The abstract frames long-context LLM inference as bottlenecked by the exploding KV cache during decoding and highlights LycheeDecode achieving up to 2.7x speedup at 128K context length while maintaining quality.
解码策略优化: LycheeDecode is described as an efficient decoding method centered on a fine-grained hybrid-head attention mechanism (with HardKuma-based selection) that dynamically routes crucial tokens through retrieval heads and shares them with sparse heads to deliver high-throughput long-context decoding.

general: Lexico 压缩 KV cache 以仅保留 15-25% 内存、保持 90-95% 性能，并在低显存下超越 2-bit 量化和 token 驱逐。
上下文与缓存优化: Lexico 利用稀疏线性组合和通用字典近似 KV cache，提供可调压缩比并在多个模型与任务间共享字典，突出上下文缓存压缩。

notes: 摘要中的核心贡献是 KV cache 压缩，就是上下文与缓存优化方向。

general: SubSpec introduces a plug-and-play, training-free speculative decoding pipeline that keeps a draft model on the GPU by sharing resident layers/KV cache and inserting low-bit substitute layers for offloaded portions, enabling deeper tree-based speculation and over 10× speedups on consumer GPUs without additional training overhead during parameter offloading ([openreview.net](https://openreview.net/pdf/98342d215ec3c042e7d15c061d02b4086e670e2b.pdf))

The paper highlights that parameter offloading has PCIe transfer bottlenecks and that speculative decoding reduces the number of expensive forward passes by verifying many draft tokens with a single target-model pass, making it a promising acceleration route for memory-limited inference ([openreview.net](https://openreview.net/pdf/98342d215ec3c042e7d15c061d02b4086e670e2b.pdf))
解码策略优化: Speculative decoding is described as using a smaller, faster draft model to propose multiple tokens and letting the target LLM verify them in parallel, so SubSpec focuses on constructing a highly aligned draft tree and optimized verification to maximize accepted speculative tokens per iteration, directly optimizing the decoding/token generation flow ([openreview.net](https://openreview.net/pdf/98342d215ec3c042e7d15c061d02b4086e670e2b.pdf))

notes: SubSpec’s main contribution is accelerating offloaded LLM deployment via a more aligned, tree-based speculative decoding loop that stays lossless and training-free while sharing KV cache and GPU layers.

general: Title explicitly names speculative speculative decoding and abstract frames the work as accelerating autoregressive decoding by parallelizing speculation and verification.

Abstract highlights Saguaro, an optimized speculative speculative decoding algorithm that doubles the speed over optimized speculative decoding baselines and quintuples throughput versus autoregressive decoding, with theoretical analysis and methods addressing SSD-specific challenges.
解码策略优化: Abstract describes replacing the sequential dependency between speculation and verification with a parallel approach that lets the draft model pre-empt verification outcomes, eliminating speculation overhead and enabling combination with other decoding accelerations (EAGLE, token tree speculation).

notes: Positive: SSD targets autoregressive decoding speed (speculative decoding) and is validated through comparative throughput gains against baselines.

general: Serving large language models at scale requires efficient KV cache management, and KVTC compresses these caches up to 20× while keeping reasoning and long-context accuracy across Llama 3.1, Mistral-NeMo, and R1-Qwen 2.5.
KVTC combines PCA-based feature decorrelation, adaptive quantization, and entropy coding for compact on- and off-GPU storage, consistently beating token eviction, quantization, and SVD baselines.
上下文与缓存优化: KV caches can be reused across conversation turns via shared-prefix prompts common in iterative editing and chat, so stale caches waste GPU memory, trigger offloading, or recomputation.
The method is a lightweight transform coder for KV caches, explicitly designed to compress and store reusable caches efficiently, enabling memory-efficient LLM serving.

notes: KVTC’s main contribution is compressing reusable KV caches for memory-efficient LLM serving, matching long-context accuracy while outperforming existing cache-management techniques.

general: We introduce GateSkip, a residual-stream gating mechanism that enables token-wise layer skipping in decoder-only LMs and ranks tokens by gate to skip low-importance ones using a per-layer budget.

The smooth, differentiable gates are fine-tuned on pretrained models to save up to 15% compute on long-form reasoning while retaining >90% accuracy and match baseline quality near 50% savings for instruction-tuned models.
模型结构侧推理优化: Each Attention/MLP branch is equipped with a sigmoid-linear gate that compresses the branch’s output before it re-enters the residual stream, enabling tokens to skip layers during inference and offering insight into transformer information flow.

notes: Layer-level gating for adaptive compute targeting inference brings the main contribution.

primary_research_object: AI 系统 / 基础设施

general: Portcullis is a privacy-preserving gateway that anonymizes sensitive data in prompts, mediates with third-party LLMs, and guarantees secure processing within encrypted memory.

notes: Focus is on building a verifiable privacy gateway for third-party LLM inference, not on the optimization labels provided.

general: MatDuck通过类定义式描述符生成和代码风格的上下文学习来唤起LLM的材料科学文本挖掘知识，重点在于增强零样本任务表现。
大量基准上数据表明MatDuck作为即插即用方法显著提升了LLM在零样本文本挖掘任务上的平均性能。

notes: 论文聚焦零样本文本挖掘方法，不涉及解码、缓存、系统、算子、结构或压缩等偏好标签，因此归入负向。

general: HiRED adapts CLS-token attention per image partition to allocate a fixed token budget, selecting the most informative visual tokens and delivering 4.7× higher throughput, 78% lower latency, and 14% GPU memory savings on LLaVA-Next-7B inference.
上下文与缓存优化: Token dropping within the fixed-budget pipeline trims the number of visual tokens, reducing memory usage by 30% for batch size 4 and preventing OOM while preserving throughput and latency benefits, so the core contribution is context/token-budget optimization.

notes: Token-dropping strategy for high-resolution VLM inference, so positive tier with context/cache optimization as the main supported label.

general: Infinite Pixel Learning (IPL) slices UHD multi-exposure input sequences and applies attention cache processing to fuse dynamic scenes on a single consumer-grade GPU in real-time (>40fps).
上下文与缓存优化: The method develops an attention cache technique, similar to KV cache for infinite data streams, plus attention cache compression to reduce the device’s storage burden, explicitly targeting long-sequence handling.

notes: Focuses on context/cache mechanisms adapted from LLM-style infinite stream processing to enable UHD fusion on constrained hardware.

general: Title and abstract describe recovering and compressing multimodal vision tokens guided by text information so large multimodal models keep important context while reducing token count.
上下文与缓存优化: Abstract states the method uses question-text similarity to recover meaningful visual tokens and merge less important ones, compressing visual tokens to about 10% of the original size to speed up training/inference for large multimodal models.

notes: 摘要明确以文本指导的视觉 token 恢复机制来压缩视觉 context，保持关键信息并提高推理效率。

general: Abstract emphasizes learning visual prompts to upgrade neural network sparsification and shows experiments across architectures/datasets that outperform existing pruning methods.
模型压缩: VPNs framework customizes visual prompts to promote superior weight sparsity and conducts joint optimization for pruning, demonstrating better performance and transferability than state-of-the-art pruning algorithms.

notes: Data-model co-design applies visual prompts specifically to support pruning in vision architectures, framing pruning as the main contribution rather than system-level or decoding changes.

general: Real-time Monte Carlo (MC) ray tracing with low sampling rates demands a denoising algorithm that adeptly balances the trade-off between quality and efficiency, and RAKD ultimately achieves state-of-the-art quality while upholding real-time performance on resource-limited devices.
模型压缩: We present a render-aware knowledge distillation (RAKD) framework ... enabling our student model to adeptly strike a balance between preserving high-frequency details and reducing low-frequency noise.

notes: Render-aware knowledge distillation is the core compression method that lets the denoiser meet real-time constraints.

general: Authors propose Neural Block Compression, a neural feature-based texture compression scheme for rendering that targets multi-resolution texture storage rather than inference optimization or serving improvements.

notes: Focuses on texture representation compression for rendering, so none of the listed optimization labels directly apply.

general: Abstract: Granular-DQ takes advantage of multi-granularity clues and local patch statistics to enable a distinctive patch-wise and layer-invariant dynamic quantization paradigm for SR models.
Abstract: Extensive experiments validate the superiority of Granular-DQ in the trade-off between efficiency and accuracy over recent state-of-the-art methods on various SR models.

notes: 论文以 Granular-DQ 动态量化机制为核心贡献，聚焦在图像超分模型的压缩与推理效率。

general: Abstract frames the work as realizing lightweight learning-based super-resolution for real-time computer graphics, focusing on reducing computational demands of SR models rather than a specific decoding/cache/system/kernel/structure/compression optimization technique.

Paper targets LVLM deployment by proposing unified structured pruning plus LoRA-based recovery to alleviate storage and compute burdens in resource-constrained settings for large vision-language models. ([irip.buaa.edu.cn](https://irip.buaa.edu.cn/info/1067/1779.htm))
模型压缩: Introduces a unified knowledge-maintenance importance metric, Taylor-based refinement, and a weight recalling plus progressive distillation recovery to achieve high-ratio structured pruning with safer recovery, outperforming prior structured pruning methods. ([irip.buaa.edu.cn](https://irip.buaa.edu.cn/info/1067/1779.htm))

notes: ['主贡献是模型压缩：统一结构化剪枝与恢复，特别是在高剪枝率下缓解模型崩溃；因此选定“模型压缩”偏好标签。 ([irip.buaa.edu.cn](https://irip.buaa.edu.cn/info/1067/1779.htm))']

general: RetouchGPT is described as an LLM-guided framework for interactive face retouching that fuses textual and visual cues to progressively modify features, so the contribution lies in a CV task rather than any optimization matching the preference labels.

notes: Abstract highlights a multi-modal retouching pipeline without proposing a new decoding, caching, kernel, structural, or compression optimization.

general: Title and abstract focus on transformer-based incremental object detection, identifying forgetting imbalance between localization and recognition and proposing the Divide-and-Conquer Amnesia strategy.
ST3 is introduced to accelerate MLLM inference without retraining, yielding ~2× speedup and ~30% of the original LLaVA KV cache while keeping performance stable across datasets.
上下文与缓存优化: PVTP prunes inattentive visual tokens across layers and VTA dynamically reduces the number of visual tokens per layer as decoding progresses, cutting redundant KV cache and attention work.

notes: Token trimming framework (PVTP + VTA) focuses on reducing redundant visual tokens and KV cache usage to speed up multimodal LLM decoding.

general: Compression of LLMs reduces the memory footprint, latency, and energy required for their inference.
We propose Output-adaptive Calibration (OAC) to incorporate the model output in the calibration process by formulating quantization error on the output cross-entropy loss.
模型压缩: Most PTQ approaches calibrate each layer with layer-wise Hessians and suffer accuracy drop at low precision, so OAC approximates output-adaptive Hessians to update weights and detect salient weights for maintaining model output, outperforming SpQR and BiLLM especially at 2-bit and binary quantization.

notes: OAC targets post-training quantization of LLM weights via output-aware calibration, making it the core compression contribution supported by the abstract.

general: MPQ-DM is a mixed-precision quantization method for diffusion models that uses outlier-driven bit-width allocation and time-smoothed relation distillation to keep accuracy at 2–4 bit settings.
模型压缩: The method specifically targets quantization errors under extremely low bit-widths by allocating mixed precision per channel and distilling representations between quantized and full-precision diffusion models.

notes: 强调在极低比特量化下恢复性能；实验展示 W2A4 下显著优于其他量化方法。

general: Token compression techniques, such as token merging and pruning, are essential for alleviating the substantial computational burden caused by the proliferation of tokens within attention mechanisms.
We introduce Multimodal Promptable Token Merging (MPTM) to eliminate redundant tokens by measuring proximity to the multimodal prompt, preserving informative ones.
Applied to multimodal diffusion models, MPTM maintains output quality while achieving a 2.9-fold throughput increase.

notes: MPTM’s core contribution is prompt-aware token pruning/merging to cut attention cost in diffusion attention, fitting the 上下文与缓存优化 preference.

general: The paper targets MoE-based LLMs, noting that All-to-All communication becomes a bottleneck as fine-grained structures activate more experts and increase overhead.
系统与调度优化: Addressing the All-to-All communication overhead in MoE training/inference is presented as the main efficiency challenge, implying the contribution is a communication-aware system optimization.

notes: Communication efficiency is the central contribution, so only the system/scheduling optimization label is justified.

general: SVS refines pruned weights to balance singular values so that compressed GAN/ Diffusion models fine-tune faster and yield better compression without extra training costs.

notes: Singular Value Scaling explicitly targets pruned-weight compression for generative models, matching the stated preference label.

general: RILQ uses rank-insensitive LoRA-based quantization error compensation to boost 2-bit LLM accuracy and keeps efficiency comparable to existing LoRA methods.
模型压缩: RILQ recovers accuracy in 2-bit LLM inference by collaboratively adjusting low-rank adapters across layers, enabling adapter-merged weight-quantized LLMs with significantly enhanced accuracy.

notes: LoRA-based quantization error compensation tailored to 2-bit LLM inference makes this a model compression-centric optimization.

general: This paper focuses on compressing decoder-only transformer-based autoregressive models through structural weight pruning to improve the model efficiency while preserving performance for both language and image generation tasks.

We propose a training-free pruning method that calculates a numerical score with Newton's method for the Attention and MLP modules, respectively, plus a compensation algorithm to recover the pruned model, yielding reduced memory usage and faster generation speeds on GPUs.

notes: 摘要明确以结构化剪枝为核心贡献优化自回归 Transformer 的推理效率。

general: ScaleOT introduces a layerwise lossy compression algorithm that uses reinforcement learning to weigh each layer and replaces raw LLM layers with lightweight harmonizers for scalable emulators.
They further present a rank reduction method to compress original LLM layers, enhancing privacy with negligible utility loss.

notes: ScaleOT’s core contribution is compressing LLM layers (lossy layer replacement plus rank reduction) to enable privacy-preserving offsite tuning with minimal degradation.

general: Title: Apollo-Forecast: Overcoming Aliasing and Inference Speed Challenges in Language Models for Time Series Forecasting
Abstract snippet: Encoding time series into tokens and using language models for processing has been shown to substantially augment the models' ability to generalize to unseen tasks.

notes: 摘要未具体陈述哪种优化策略是作者的主要贡献，无法归入指定偏好标签。

general: 摘要指出量化算法压缩LLM并提出从被舍弃的权重中挖掘宝藏、设计补偿框架以提高精度。
模型压缩: 主要贡献是LLM量化，构造搜索空间并将高潜力权重并入原始量化权重以提升精度，且可与多种量化算法结合。

notes: 主要聚焦LLM量化与权重补偿，提升部署资源受限时的精度表现。

general: Large Language Models have practical application constrained by memory and computation, so ABQ-LLM introduces a novel arbitrary-bit quantization algorithm and inference framework to accelerate LLM inference.
ABQ-LLM can convert each component bit width gain into actual acceleration gain, maximizing performance under mixed precision and outperforming AffineQuant and SmoothQuant.
模型压缩: ABQ-LLM addresses low-bit quantization degradation with distribution correction and bit balance strategies and reconstructs arbitrary precision quantized matrix multiplication via BTC equivalents to bypass INT4/INT8 limits, realizing memory compression and acceleration gains.

notes: 重点在量化压缩策略及其混合精度推理支持。

general: model merging strategies have emerged, merging all LLMs into one model to reduce the memory footprint during inference.
Channel Merging ... clusters and merges channel parameters ... reduces parameter conflicts while enhancing storage efficiency.
It obtains results comparable to model ensemble with just 53% parameters when used with a task-specific router.

notes: Channel Merging is presented to compress merged experts while preserving specialized knowledge, matching ensemble performance with fewer parameters.

general: Abstract: Quantization stands as a pivotal technique for large language model (LLM) serving...delves into the layer-wise error distribution of LLMs during post-training quantization. Subsequently, we introduce ASER, an algorithm consisting of ... Error Reconstruction ... Activation Smoothing ... ASER is capable of quantizing typical LLMs to low-bit ones, particularly preserving accuracy even in W4A8 per-channel setup.
模型压缩: Abstract: This paper is anchored in the basic idea of model compression objectives... ASER is capable of quantizing typical LLMs to low-bit ones, particularly preserving accuracy even in W4A8 per-channel setup.

notes: ASER uses low-rank LoRA-style compensation plus activation smoothing to reduce quantization error for low-bit LLM quantization.

general: Dynamic Operator Optimization (Dop) dynamically tunes the Segmented Gather Matrix-Vector Multiplication (SGMV) operator for different LoRA-serving scenarios via a search-space constructor and evolutionary optimization.
Optimization Engine uses a cost model to iteratively refine SGMV implementations so the operator can adapt to diverse workloads and keep performance high.
算子与内核优化: Dop’s core advance is automated operator-level optimization of the SGMV kernel, enabling batching across LoRA models and improving computational efficiency without changing the high-level serving stack.

notes: Targeting multi-tenant LoRA serving, Dop boosts SGMV throughput by 1.30–1.46× through automated evolutionary search over operator implementations.

general: Falcon 引入半自回归的 speculative decoding 框架，结合 Coupled Sequential Glancing Distillation 提升同一块内 token 的依赖建模，目标是推理速度与准确率的折中。
Custom-Designed Decoding Tree 允许 drafter 单次前向生成多个 token，并在需要时执行多次前向，以提高草稿 token 数量和整体接受率，实测在 Vicuna 与 LLaMA2-Chat 上达 2.91x~3.51x 的无损加速。
解码策略优化: 论文聚焦在 speculative decoding 方法的并行草稿策略、依赖建模（Coupled Sequential Glancing Distillation）以及专用的 Decoding Tree 结构来生成多 token，以获得更高的草稿准确率与采纳率。

notes: Falcon 主要通过解码策略层面的 semi-autoregressive speculative decoding 和定制树形流程实现加速，实验对比 Eagle/Medusa/Lookahead/SPS/PLD 等方法。

general: Abstract says step-by-step autoregressive decoding limits speed, so they propose multi-branch drafting that parallel-validates candidate drafts to decode multiple tokens per forward pass.
解码策略优化: They extend autoregressive decoding to a multi-branch drafting procedure that generates drafts without extra models or training, preserving quality while emitting 2.0–3.2 tokens per forward step and roughly 2× throughput versus autoregressive decoding.

notes: Title/abstract focus is on accelerating autoregressive decoding via multi-branch self-drafting.

general: RTLIR operates at the token level, deciding whether to retain each token to refine the input and identify the key context that most impacts generation quality.
The agent learns token-selection probabilities based on the current state, enabling a more targeted, fine-grained input/data optimization that boosts LLM accuracy by 6%.

notes: Reinforced token-level selection refines context to improve downstream LLM outputs; key evidence is in the abstract’s explanation of RTLIR’s token retention decisions.

模型压缩: Abstract details Adaptive Sparse Trainer (AST) that learns semi-structured sparse masks during retraining, adds distillation and auxiliary parameters, and keeps LLaMA2-7B’s accuracy close to dense while using far fewer tokens/GPU hours.
general: Title/abstract emphasize deploying and compressing large language models via semi-structured adaptive sparse training to curb latency and memory costs.

notes: AST demonstrates that semi-structured sparse pruning with knowledge distillation can match dense LLaMA2-7B quality with under 0.4% of pretraining tokens and GPU hours, showing a feasible compression path for LLMs.

解码策略优化: C3oT compresses an original longer CoT into a shorter CoT while maintaining key information and interpretability.
A conditioned inference method lets LLMs gain reasoning ability from longer CoT by generating shorter CoT.

general: Title and abstract frame the work as Dynamic-Width Speculative Beam Decoding aimed at making LLM inference faster.
Abstract highlights that the autoregressive nature of LLMs makes inference slow and costly, motivating this speculative decoding approach.
解码策略优化: Title highlights speculative beam decoding for LLM inference, and the abstract underscores autoregressive inference inefficiency that the proposed decoding method seeks to fix.

notes: Focuses on a decoding-time optimization for LLM inference latency/throughput.

general: Serving LLMs requires substantial memory due to KV cache growth with sequence length, motivating cache compression via quantization.
QJL quantizes the KV cache to 3 bits, cuts memory by over fivefold, and runs faster without sacrificing accuracy.
上下文与缓存优化: An effective approach to compress KV cache is quantization, but traditional methods store per-block constants with 1–2 additional bits per value; QJL eliminates that overhead by combining a Johnson-Lindenstrauss transform with sign-bit quantization, backed by an asymmetric inner product estimator.

notes: Focuses on KV cache quantization for LLM serving, with a lightweight CUDA kernel implementation to keep runtime fast while slashing cache memory.

general: The paper introduces Cache Sparse Representation (CSR), which converts the dense Key-Value cache tensor into sparse indexes and weights to shrink memory usage during LLM inference, and NeuralDict to generate the dictionary for the sparse representation, matching KV cache quantization performance while staying functional in memory-constrained settings.

notes: 关注LLM推理中的KV cache内存瓶颈，提出CSR+NeuralDict实现稀疏表示，主要优化上下文缓存而非模型结构或系统调度。

general: Hierarchical Context Pruning (HCP) constructs high-quality prompts for repository-level completion, preventing prompt lengths from exceeding the model’s context window and improving completion accuracy and throughput across six Code LLMs.
上下文与缓存优化: HCP keeps prompt length near 8k tokens versus the full repository’s ~50k tokens, directly addressing long-context prompt management and completion latency during repository-level code completion.

notes: HCP is evaluated on CrossCodeEval and emphasizes keeping the contextual prompt compact for real-world code completion, so the primary optimization target is context/caching rather than model or system changes.

上下文与缓存优化: Prompt compression is increasingly studied for its potential to reduce computational costs and alleviate the burden on language models when processing lengthy prompts.

Prompt compression encounters two significant challenges: information entropy may not be optimal and semantic significance is context-dependent, making independent token retention decisions inadequate.

notes: 摘要聚焦 prompt compression 在长上下文 LLM 场景下缓解计算与上下文负担，明确以此方法为主贡献。

general: ‘Compression-Aware Computing for Scalable and Sustainable AI’ centers on customizing large-scale generative AI models for memory- and energy-constrained devices.
模型压缩: The framework lets models recognize and adapt to compressed states by integrating compression techniques such as sparsification, quantization, and low-rank decomposition to retain performance.

notes: Talk frames compression-aware computing as the main contribution for making generative models practical on low-cost hardware and highlights downstream benefits (e.g., enabling Alzheimer’s single-cell transcriptomics analysis).

general: Title and abstract emphasize scalable, efficient probabilistic inference across Bayesian deep learning and generative modeling, presenting a new compute paradigm leveraging accelerators plus a discrete-domain inference framework with gradient guidance.
模型压缩: The talk highlights a new compute paradigm that leverages modern accelerators—specifically low-precision and sparsity—to significantly speed up inference while preserving accuracy, indicating compression-focused inference optimization.

notes: Talk-style paper focusing on inference-time efficiency improvements rather than novel benchmarks.

上下文与缓存优化: While 4-bit quantization has emerged as a memory-optimal choice for non-reasoning models and zero-shot tasks across scales, we show that this universal prescription fails for reasoning models, where KV cache rather than model size can dominate memory.

notes: Shows reasoning-model memory bottlenecks shift from model weights to KV cache, motivating cache-aware memory optimization.

general: title describes a “low-bit vector quantization of KV cache,” and the abstract calls out the large KV cache size as the reason LLM inference is memory-intensive for large batches and long sequences.
上下文与缓存优化: title highlights “double normalization” for calibration-free low-bit vector quantization of the KV cache, indicating the core contribution is compressing the KV cache to ease inference memory demands.

notes: Focused on quantizing the KV cache to cut memory pressure during LLM inference.

general: Attention sinks and compression valleys have attracted significant attention as two puzzling phenomena in large language models, but have been studied in isolation.

This unified view motivates us to propose the Mix-Compress-Refine theory of information flow as an attempt to explain how LLMs organize their computation in depth by controlling attention and representational compression via massive activations.

notes: The abstract develops a theoretical explanation for representational phenomena in LLMs rather than introducing or validating an optimization method aligned with the stated preference labels.

上下文与缓存优化: DuoAttention: Efficient Long-Context LLM Inference with Retrieval and Streaming Heads
Deploying long-context large language models (LLMs) is essential but poses significant computational and memory challenges.

notes: DuoAttention’s retrieval and streaming heads target efficient long-context context management for LLM inference.

general: Polar Sparsity shows contextual sparsity can scale to large batch sizes, delivering high-throughput LLM inference acceleration with minimal changes.
模型结构侧推理优化: Selective Head Attention keeps attention head sparsity stable across batches while MLP sparsity vanishes, driving the sparse structural change that enables the 2.2× end-to-end speedups.

notes: The core contribution is restructuring attention to selectively activate sparse heads, placing the work squarely in model-structure inference optimization.

general: Introduces cascading sub-cache buffers that selectively retain the most relevant tokens in the KV cache so the model keeps longer context histories without growing cache size.
Claims the mechanism reduces prefill stage latency by 6.8× versus flash attention at 1M tokens, showing concrete efficiency gains for extended context handling.

notes: 本文主攻大上下文 KV Cache 管理，摘要里以 cascading sub-cache 缓存策略为核心贡献。

general: Neural network pruning is a promising technique to mitigate the excessive computational and memory requirements of large language models (LLMs).

Bottlenecked Transformer augments a decoder-only LLM with an auxiliary Cache Processor that performs periodic, non-causal, in-place rewrites of incoming and past KV segments at newline-delimited reasoning step boundaries.
上下文与缓存优化: The processor consolidates recently written KV entries and reconsolidates a small, top-k attention-selected set of prior entries conditioned on recent context, demonstrating cache-focused reasoning improvements.

notes: Periodic KV cache consolidation/reconsolidation is the core method the abstract highlights for improving reasoning, so the optimization focuses on context/cache handling.

general: MUFFIN 是首个神经心理声学编码系统，通过跨频带的向量量化实现高保真音频压缩，并在多种数据集上超越现有音频重建表现。
模型压缩: 提出 Multi-Band Spectral Residual Vector Quantization 机制来在不同频段量化潜在表示，优化比特率分配并保持感知质量，最终实现 12.5 kHz 的高压缩率。

notes: 强调量化/压缩与感知建模的融合；高压缩 variant 仍保留重建质量，体现主要贡献在模型压缩方向。

general: The paper proposes a serving system that consolidates similar experts across fine-tuned MoE LLMs and applies runtime partial reconfiguration so a single GPU can host multiple models with throughput comparable to servicing just one while keeping TTFT low.

notes: Focuses on multi-tenant serving efficiency for MoE LLMs rather than structural/model changes.

general: Speculative decoding is leveraged to accelerate LLM inference while preserving generation quality, and the paper models hyperparameter selection as a bandit problem to adaptively choose configurations online during generation.
解码策略优化: BanditSpec uses bandit-based hyperparameter selection algorithms (UCBSpec and EXP3Spec) to tune speculative decoding configurations in real time, keeping throughput close to the oracle best setup.

notes: Training-free online bandit learning focuses on tuning speculative decoding settings as text is generated, which is the paper’s core contribution.

general: SCBench benchmarks long-context LLM inference through a KV cache-centric analysis of generation, compression, retrieval, and loading discussions across multiple shared-context tasks.
上下文与缓存优化: The abstract emphasizes KV cache reuse, compression, and lifecycle stages, and compares long-context methods on their KV cache behaviors, making cache management the core optimization focus.

notes: The paper’s main contribution is analyzing and benchmarking KV cache management for long-context LLM inference, so context and cache optimization is the dominant qualification.

general: Speculative sampling reduces the latency of autoregressive decoding for target model LLMs without sacrificing inference quality, by using a cheap draft model to suggest a candidate token and a verification criterion to accept or resample this token.

In this work, we prove that these formulations are equivalent to an exponentially large relaxed OTLP, so it remains infeasible to solve, then reverse engineer subset selection to formulate the OTLP as a max-flow problem and reduce it to a convex optimization problem in at most V variables.

This allows us to devise an algorithm for optimal n-draft speculative sampling when the n tokens are chosen i.i.d. from a single draft model, which can be tuned to arbitrary accuracy, and measure acceptance rates and runtimes, reporting 90% acceptance with under 100 ms overhead per generated token with negligible deviation from the target model distribution.
解码策略优化: Multi-draft speculative sampling, optimal transport-based verification, and the convex relaxation-driven algorithm are all proposed to improve acceptance and decoding efficiency of autoregressive LLM decoding, showing the paper’s main contribution is a speculative decoding strategy optimization.

notes: Convex-optimization-based multi-draft speculative sampling advances LLM decoding strategy with high acceptance and low latency.
