general: introduce pipelined-ring parallelism (PRP) to overlap disk I/O with compute and communication
propose Halda, a heterogeneity-aware scheduler that co-optimizes per-device CPU/GPU workloads and device selection under RAM/VRAM constraints

notes: prima.cpp focuses on scheduling and system orchestration to enable LLM inference on heterogeneous home clusters, with PRP and Halda at its core.

general: Modern multimodal large language models for streaming video understanding see KV cache grow linearly, quickly exceeding fixed memory on edge devices, motivating InfiniPot-V’s memory cap enforcement on-device without retraining.
上下文与缓存优化: InfiniPot-V monitors the KV cache during video encoding, and once a threshold is met it runs a compression pass that removes temporally redundant tokens via the TaR metric while keeping semantically significant tokens via the VaN ranking, yielding up to 94% peak GPU memory reduction under a hard, length-independent cap.

notes: InfiniPot-V’s main contribution is the streaming KV cache compression framework for memory-constrained VLM inference.

general: Title/abstract emphasize Mixture Compressor (MC) for MoE-LLMs that combines quantization and pruning to attain extreme compression while keeping accuracy losses small.
模型压缩: PMQ formulates adaptive bit-width allocation as a Linear Programming problem to mitigate storage/loading overheads, and ODP dynamically prunes tokens/experts during inference to shrink activated parameters and maintain performance.

notes: MC is training-free, marrying static quantization with dynamic pruning to reduce MoE-LLM parameters by over 76% at 2.54 bits with minimal accuracy loss.

上下文与缓存优化: Dynamic-LLaVA dynamically reduces the redundancy of vision context in the prefill stage and decreases the memory and computation overhead of the generated language context during decoding, with tailored sparsification inference for modes including decoding with and without KV cache.

notes: 根据摘要，本文的核心是通过动态 vision-language 上下文稀疏化在预填充与解码阶段节省内存与计算，明确对应上下文与缓存优化。

general: OSCAR 介绍了一种查询依赖的在线软压缩方法，在推理时动态压缩检索到的信息，低开销地提升 RAG 推理速度并保持精度。

notes: 聚焦在线压缩 RAG 检索上下文，直接对应上下文与缓存优化。

general: Quantization techniques such as BitsAndBytes, AWQ, and GPTQ are widely used... but often degrades accuracy when using low-bit representations.
GlowQ proposes a group-shared low-rank approximation that caches a single shared right factor per input-sharing group and only restores the groups or layers that yield the highest accuracy benefit.

notes: Focuses on enhancing low-bit quantized LLMs by reducing the overhead of low-rank correction modules through selective restoration guided by shared factors.

general: ProtoKV compresses KV cache by clustering semantic-anchored tokens and position-determined tokens to preserve semantic integrity while improving efficiency.
Experiments on LongBench show ProtoKV outperforms prior methods under equal memory constraints.
上下文与缓存优化: ProtoKV separately processes position-determined and semantic-anchored tokens to build semantic prototypes and cluster nearby tokens as compression units for the KV cache.

notes: Consumes long contexts by compressing KV cache via semantic token prototypes, supporting the primary focus on LLM long-text decoding efficiency.

general: “propose an accurate and MPC-friendly KV cache eviction framework … combining static eviction to discard unimportant KV cache and dynamic selection to activate only a small subset for attention computation.”

notes: Primary contribution is MPC-friendly KV cache eviction to reduce latency for private LLM inference.

general: Large language models (LLMs) face high computation and memory costs, so the paper presents new directions using SVD as a hardware-independent, tunable solution for LLM compression and introduces Dobi-SVD to tackle truncation and information-loss issues.
模型压缩: Dobi-SVD addresses optimal truncation positions, efficient weight updates, and the injection-induced information loss when applying Singular Value Decomposition to compress LLM weights and activations.

notes: Abstract frames the main contribution as an SVD-based compression method for LLMs, fitting the model-compression preference.

模型压缩: Abstract emphasizes dynamic non-uniform compression that adjusts sparsity per block and per layer to minimize accuracy loss while satisfying a global compression threshold.

notes: Focuses on evolutionary search for accurate dynamic LLM compression.

general: Speculative decoding is widely adopted for lossless LLM inference acceleration, and CAS-Spec proposes cascade adaptive self-speculative decoding, dynamic draft routing, and Dynamic Tree Cascade heuristics to boost on-the-fly speedup to 1.1×–2.3× over autoregressive decoding. ([arxiv.org](https://arxiv.org/abs/2510.26843?utm_source=openai))
解码策略优化: CAS-Spec’s Cascade Adaptive Self-Speculative Decoding and Dynamic Tree Cascade algorithms explicitly modify the speculative decoding flow—draft construction, acceptance heuristics, and adaptive routing—to deliver much higher lossless inference throughput across LLMs. ([arxiv.org](https://arxiv.org/abs/2510.26843?utm_source=openai))

notes: Focus is on speculative decoding workflow innovations (CAS-Spec + DyTC) for lossless LLM inference acceleration, matching the decoding-strategy optimization preference. ([arxiv.org](https://arxiv.org/abs/2510.26843?utm_source=openai))

general: Preble is the first distributed LLM serving platform that targets and optimizes prompt sharing, recognizing that many prompts share repeated context across requests and production deployments are distributed by nature. ([arxiv.org](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.00023?utm_source=openai))
系统与调度优化: We designed a distributed scheduling system that co-optimizes KV state reuse and computation load-balancing with a new scheduling algorithm and a hierarchical scheduling mechanism to improve distributed serving latency. ([arxiv.org](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.00023?utm_source=openai))

notes: The paper centers on distributed prompt scheduling for LLM serving, yielding 1.5X–14.5X average latency and 2X–10X p99 improvements over prior serving systems while reusing cached prompt state across GPUs. ([arxiv.org](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.00023?utm_source=openai))

general: Proposes a static 8-bit per-tensor quantization method for selective state-space models that suppresses activation peaks and uses Hadamard transforms for outlier-free output quantization, enabling weight-activation quantization of Mamba 2.8B and Jamba 52B with minimal accuracy loss.

notes: Claims the quantized models run with lower latency on Nvidia Orin Nano 8G while retaining cloud and edge applicability.

general: Abstract说明ThinK通过查询驱动的KV cache通道剪枝，针对长上下文任务的LLaMA/Mistral模型在保持准确率的同时，比标准KV cache清理和量化节省20%以上的内存并允许单GPU批量扩展至5倍([arxiv.org](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.21018?utm_source=openai))
上下文与缓存优化: ThinK的核心方法是识别KV cache通道维度的冗余，通过查询依赖的剪枝只去除最不显著的通道，从而直接优化长上下文的缓存占用([arxiv.org](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.21018?utm_source=openai))

notes: ThinK在缓存剪枝基础上与KIVI结合可实现峰值内存减少2.8倍，进一步验证了查询意识缓存优化的实际效益([arxiv.org](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.21018?utm_source=openai))

general: We introduce Encode-Prefill-Decode (EPD) Disaggregation, a novel framework that separates the encoding, prefill, and decode stages onto dedicated resources.

This includes a module for optimal resource allocation for disaggregated serving and a novel role-switching method to handle changing workload characteristics, leading to large gains in memory efficiency, batch sizes, and SLO attainment compared to systems that do not disaggregate.
系统与调度优化: Unlike current systems, which bundle encoding and prefill together, our approach decouples these steps, unlocking new opportunities and optimizations including resource allocation for disaggregated serving and role-switching to handle workload changes.

notes: 论文关注大模型多模态推理-serving 的阶段拆分与资源调度优化，从而显著提升关键 SLO，最直接对应系统与调度优化。

general: ShadowKV stores the low-rank key cache and offloads the value cache to reduce the KV memory footprint for larger batches and longer sequences.
An accurate KV selection strategy reconstructs minimal sparse KV pairs on the fly to keep decoding latency low while serving long-context LLMs.
上下文与缓存优化: The system specifically optimizes the expanding KV cache for long-context inference by compressing keys and selective reconstruction of KV pairs, which directly targets context/caching bottlenecks.

notes: Focuses on cache-aware storage and selective access to sustain high throughput for long-context LLM inference.

general: SpinQuant incorporates learned rotation matrices to improve quantized network accuracy for LLMs, narrowing the accuracy gap with full precision across LLaMA-2 7B and LLaMA-3 8B.
With 4-bit quantization of weights, activations, and the KV cache, SpinQuant outperforms prior PTQ and QAT baselines and reduces zero-shot reasoning gaps by up to 45.1% relative to QuaRot.
模型压缩: Post-training quantization applied to weights, activations, and the KV cache greatly reduces memory usage but suffers from outliers, so SpinQuant learns rotation parameterizations that yield better quantized accuracy and close the accuracy gap to full precision.

notes: SpinQuant is a quantization-oriented technique for LLMs that learns rotation matrices to mitigate outliers and deliver stronger accuracy/latency trade-offs; code real-world ready on GitHub.

general: Title/abstract describe HiFC as a DRAM-free scheme for long-context LLM inference that swaps KV cache pages to SSDs while keeping throughput comparable to DRAM-based swapping.
上下文与缓存优化: Abstract: “...HiFC enables direct access to SSD-resident memory..., bypassing host DRAM and alleviating PCIe bottlenecks... fine-grained block mapping ... stabilizing latency and throughput under load.” which directly targets KV cache management for long-context inference.

notes: Positive label because the main contribution is cache swapping for long-context LLM inference; SSD-based KV cache management is the only preference tag supported by the abstract evidence.

general: GANQ是面向LLM部署的layer-wise非均匀量化框架，优化了GPU端的mpGEMM并减少精度损失，在RTX 4090上实现2.57×加速并提升内存/推理效率。
模型压缩: 论文主要贡献是一个训练无关、GPU自适应的非均匀量化算法（GANQ），通过减少层级量化误差来接近FP16基线，并推动3-bit/4-bit量化性能。

notes: 基于摘要的核心贡献是模型量化压缩，其他提及的硬件加速和mpGEMM仅是为该压缩方法落地服务。

general: DP-LLM dynamically assigns precision to each layer based on input values to match target precision or latency, using multi-scale quantization to overlay multiple model variants with different bitwidths.
Experimental results across multiple models and benchmarks show DP-LLM achieves a superior performance-latency trade-off compared to prior approaches.

notes: 摘要强调通过动态量化/混合精度在推理时适配不同层的精度，以提升 LLM 推理的性能-延迟折中，归于模型压缩。

general: TRIM-KV learns each token’s intrinsic importance with a retention gate that predicts scores and evicts low-score tokens so the memory-bounded KV cache only keeps the most critical tokens, improving long-context benchmarks and even beating full-cache models.
上下文与缓存优化: Memory-bounded inference is addressed via TRIM-KV’s gate that scores tokens at creation time and evicts those with low retention when the cache budget is exceeded, directly optimizing cache content and long-context utility.

notes: 摘要强调为长上下文推理学习 token 保留策略，既减少 KV cache 开销又提升低内存推理表现，符合上下文与缓存优化偏好。

general: Title: EPIC: Efficient Position-Independent Caching for Serving Large Language Models, focused on serving efficiency for LLMs.
上下文与缓存优化: Context caching improves serving performance by reusing Key-Value (KV) vectors, the intermediate representations of tokens that are repeated across requests, but existing context caching requires exact prefix matches, limiting reuse when immutable content is preceded by varying prefixes.

notes: 摘要强调主要贡献是改进上下文缓存以支持 position-independent reuse，这直接对应上下文与缓存优化。

general: NANOMIND decomposes LMMs into modular bricks and co-designs hardware/software so each brick runs on its ideal accelerator, enabling energy-efficient on-device multimodal inference on battery-powered SoCs by breaking monolithic execution and orchestrating an event-driven cascade pipeline.([openreview.net](https://openreview.net/pdf/8231a92d571087e8e515651335932785938e41bd.pdf))
系统与调度优化: The framework’s core is cross-accelerator scheduling that assigns vision, fusion, and decoding modules to GPU/NPU/CPU under unified memory while a lightweight scheduler offloads layers based on battery, memory, and latency needs, plus zero-copy buffer management for dynamic workload offloading.([openreview.net](https://openreview.net/pdf/8231a92d571087e8e515651335932785938e41bd.pdf))

notes: Prototype demos over 20h runtime and outperforms existing frameworks via the co-designed execution system.([openreview.net](https://openreview.net/pdf/8231a92d571087e8e515651335932785938e41bd.pdf))

general: Multi model inference, where multiple task-specialized models collaborate to solve complex real-world problems, has recently emerged as a prominent paradigm, particularly in the development of agentic AI systems. However, in such scenarios, each model must maintain its own Key-Value (KV) cache for the identical prompt, leading to explosive memory consumption.
上下文与缓存优化: However, in such scenarios, each model must maintain its own Key-Value (KV) cache for the identical prompt, leading to explosive memory consumption.

notes: Focuses on reusing identical KV cache entries so multi-model inference does not multiply memory usage.

general: Post-training compression reduces the computational and memory costs of LLMs while the introduced ACBench evaluates agentic capabilities across workflows, tool use, long-context understanding, and real-world tasks.
模型压缩: ACBench considers 4-bit quantization (GPTQ, AWQ) and 50% pruning (Wanda, SparseGPT) across 15 models and reports trade-offs between workflow/tool use preservation and real-world accuracy drops, showing actionable insights for optimizing LLM compression.

notes: Focuses on quantization/pruning trade-offs for compressed LLMs’ agentic abilities.

general: Reducing the key-value (KV) cache burden in Large Language Models (LLMs) significantly accelerates inference.
Spotlight Attention introduces non-linear hashing functions to optimize the embedding distribution of queries and keys, improving coding efficiency and retrieval precision.
Specialized CUDA kernels implement hashing retrieval for 512K tokens in under 100μs on a single A100 GPU, raising end-to-end throughput up to 3× compared to vanilla decoding.
上下文与缓存优化: Dynamically selecting critical KV caches during decoding maintains performance, and Spotlight Attention’s non-linear hashing drastically shortens hash codes while improving retrieval precision relative to linear hashing.

notes: Spotlight Attention’s core contribution is optimizing KV cache selection/retrieval for LLM decoding via non-linear hashing, supported by lightweight training and GPU kernels.

general: LLMs are increasingly used in applications requiring long context lengths, but the key-value (KV) cache often becomes a memory bottleneck on GPUs as context grows.
We propose Commutative Vector Quantization (CommVQ) to significantly reduce memory usage for long-context LLM inference.
Experiments on long-context benchmarks and GSM8K show that our method reduces FP16 KV cache size by 87.5% with 2-bit quantization, while outperforming state-of-the-art KV cache quantization methods.

notes: CommVQ compresses the KV cache via RoPE-commutative additive quantization, enabling a LLaMA-3.1 8B model to run with a 128K context on a single RTX 4090.

general: Authors argue prior LVLM speedups trim image tokens only before or inside the LLM while the costly image encoder still dominates, so they jointly optimize encoder, LLM, and other components for end-to-end acceleration.
上下文与缓存优化: They introduce iLLaVA, a token merging strategy that recycles information from discarded visual tokens to reduce selector load, delivering up to 2× throughput and 4× prefilling time gains and enabling larger models to outperform smaller ones.

notes: Token merging cuts redundant visual tokens flowing into the LLM, fitting the context/cache optimization focus.

general: any4 是对 LLM 权重的学习型 4-bit 量化方案，兼容多种模型家族并在各种量化等级上保持高精度。
模型压缩: 方案通过 4-bit 量化（any4/any3/any2）实现精度与压缩的权衡，并用少量样本完成校准，同时开源 tinygemm 提供低延迟的量化推理。

notes: 主要贡献在于低比特量化及其高效实现，兼顾准确率与部署延迟；校准只需单个多样化样本。

general: 论文针对长 KV cache 推理带来的效率挑战，提出 Ada-KV 通过 adaptively allocating eviction budgets head-wise 来控制 cache 大小并保持生成质量。
上下文与缓存优化: 摘要强调建立理论损失上界并提出 head-wise 自适应预算分配来优化 KV cache 驱逐，直接属于上下文与缓存优化的核心贡献。

notes: 摘要显示作者主要贡献是自适应的 KV cache 驱逐预算分配，充分支撑将该论文划归上下文与缓存优化标签。

general: Balanced Token Pruning (BTP) divides pruning into stages that focus on downstream-layer outputs first and local consistency later to reduce the number of vision tokens without losing accuracy, achieving 78% compression while keeping 96.7% performance across LVLMs.

notes: Token pruning for LVLMs is explicitly framed as reducing context tokens via staged pruning, matching the "上下文与缓存优化" preference.

general: SeedLM is a novel post-training compression method that encodes each weight block via seeds of a pseudo-random generator, enabling data-free compression that retains Llama3 70B accuracy at 4- and 3-bit levels.
模型压缩: SeedLM trades compute for fewer memory accesses by reconstructing weight blocks from pseudo-random seeds plus compressed coefficients, achieving model-size compression benchmarks on Llama3 70B without calibration data.

notes: The abstract’s focus is on novel weight compression for LLM inference, so 模型压缩 is the single supported preference label.

general: Abstract highlights sequential consistency in specific attention heads and a coefficient-of-variation detector motivating CateKV’s hybrid KV cache that keeps only critical token information for those heads while preserving adaptive heads’ KV pairs for accuracy.
上下文与缓存优化: CateKV’s hybrid KV cache shrinks cache size and computation by retaining critical tokens for consistent heads and keeping adaptive heads’ KV pairs, which cuts memory up to 2.72× and boosts decoding throughput up to 3.96× on long-context benchmarks.

notes: CateKV accelerates long-context LLM inference by compressing the KV cache based on head consistency, yielding major memory and latency savings.

general: FlatQuant (Fast and Learnable Affine Transformation) is a new post-training quantization approach that enhances the flatness of weights and activations for LLMs.

Extensive experiments show FlatQuant sets a new state-of-the-art benchmark for quantization, including <1% accuracy drop for W4A4 on LLaMA-3-70B and up to 2.3x prefill plus 1.7x decoding speedup vs. FP16.
模型压缩: The paper focuses on minimizing quantization error via affine transformations per linear layer, applying Kronecker products and fusing all operations into a single kernel to reduce overhead.

notes: Post-training quantization is the core contribution, so model compression is the only preference label supported by the abstract evidence.

general: Title and abstract emphasize efficient long-context LLM inference via dynamic KV cache management and context selection (OmniKV).
上下文与缓存优化: OmniKV significantly reduces KV cache memory usage (up to 75%) while extending Llama-3-8B context from 128K to 450K, enabling faster inference without token dropping or retraining.

notes: OmniKV is a training-free, token-dropping-free inference approach that exploits layer-wise token importance similarity to shrink the KV cache footprint for long-context LLMs.

general: 摘要强调 DTP 通过两阶段剪枝显著减少多模态 Mamba LLM 中冗余视觉 token，使推理计算减少近 50% 且同时提高性能，直接支撑模型压缩优化。

notes: 标题/摘要均围绕多模态 LLM 的 token 剪枝展开，归类为模型压缩。

general: SuffixDecoding uses suffix trees to cache long tokens and adaptively speculate more when acceptance likelihood is high, enabling up to 3.9× speedups over prior speculative methods on agentic LLM workloads like SWE-Bench and Text-to-SQL.
解码策略优化: Abstract emphasizes speculative decoding adaptations—caching predictable suffixes and varying speculative token counts—to reduce LLM inference latency for repetitive agentic requests.

notes: 根据摘要，作者的核心贡献是新的 speculative decoding 方法 SuffixDecoding，因而标记“解码策略优化”且保持唯一性。

general: Diffusion models face rising memory and latency, so the authors introduce SVDQuant to quantize weights and activations to 4 bits while co-designing the Nunchaku inference engine that fuses low-rank and low-bit kernels to avoid extra data movement.
模型压缩: SVDQuant absorbs outliers in a low-rank branch and lets a quantized branch handle the residuals, enabling aggressive 4-bit quantization on both weights and activations with reduced memory usage and speedups over prior W4A16 baselines.

notes: Also supports off-the-shelf low-rank adapters without re-quantization while cutting redundant memory access via the fused inference engine.

模型压缩: Title states “Bias-Corrected Vector Quantization for MoE Large Language Models” and the abstract highlights the enormous parameter sizes and memory demands in MoE models, showing the main contribution is compression for deployment in constrained environments.

notes: KBVQ-MoE targets MoE LLM compression via vector quantization to reduce size/memory for resource-limited serving.

general: Autoregressive models generate ultra-long videos chunk-by-chunk, but the sequential process is slow; while caching helps traditional diffusion, existing approaches assume uniform denoising, which fails for the varying similarity patterns across chunks in autoregressive generation, motivating new caching strategies.

notes: Flow-aware caching tailored to video chunk similarity is introduced to accelerate autoregressive generation.

primary_research_object: AI 系统 / 基础设施

general: Abstract describes SpaceServe as a serving system that decouples modality encoders from the decoder, co-locating them on the same GPU via fine-grained SM partitioning to space-multiplex multimodal LLM execution and avoid idle SM/HBM resources. ([neurips.cc](https://neurips.cc/virtual/2025/poster/115356))
系统与调度优化: The paper introduces a cost-model-guided Space-Inference Scheduler (SIS) that dynamically assigns SM slices and a Time-Windowed Shortest-Remaining-First policy that batches encoder requests to minimize completion latency and smooth decoder arrivals, signaling that scheduler-driven serving optimization is the main contribution. ([neurips.cc](https://neurips.cc/virtual/2025/poster/115356))

notes: Evaluation reports that SpaceServe cuts time-per-output-token by 4.81× on average and up to 28.9× on NVIDIA A100 GPUs, highlighting the system-level throughput gains from this scheduling strategy. ([neurips.cc](https://neurips.cc/virtual/2025/poster/115356))

general: Post-training quantization framework Bit-DGDM sparsely models activation outliers and uses low-rank decomposition to accelerate inference and reduce FP32 memory by up to 2.8× while matching ultra-low precision (down to 4-bit).

notes: Quantization is the core contribution, so model compression is the best fitting preference while the diffusion model itself drives the primary research focus.

general: FreqKV compresses the growing KV cache in the frequency domain to extend LLaMA-2-7B from 8K to 256K tokens while keeping perplexity stable.
上下文与缓存优化: It centers on KV cache compression instead of token eviction, enabling prefilling and decoding to handle long contexts by iteratively compressing cache entries.

notes: Parameter-free, architecture-agnostic frequency-domain compression shows consistent gains on prefilling and decoding benchmarks for long-context extension.

general: The paper proves sparsity and quantization interact non-orthogonally and demonstrates compounded accuracy loss when both are applied to large language models like OPT and LLaMA, offering deployment insights for resource-constrained inference.

notes: 主线在于压缩方法的组合顺序和误差，强调如何在服务端降低成本并保持准确率。

general: FreeKV is a training-free algorithm-system co-optimization framework to enhance KV cache retrieval efficiency while preserving accuracy in long-context LLM deployments. ([arxiv.org](https://arxiv.org/abs/2505.13109))
上下文与缓存优化: FreeKV shifts KV selection and recall off the critical path via speculative retrieval and fine-grained correction, and overlaps hybrid CPU/GPU KV layouts plus double-buffered streamed recall with computation to hide latency, directly boosting KV cache retrieval efficiency with near-lossless accuracy. ([arxiv.org](https://arxiv.org/abs/2505.13109))

notes: Experiments report near-lossless accuracy and up to 13× speedup over prior KV retrieval methods, underscoring the cache-focused optimization. ([arxiv.org](https://arxiv.org/abs/2505.13109))

general: DFloat11 是一个无损压缩框架，将 LLM/DM 的参数规模减少 30% 且保持位级输出一致。
该方法通过基于频率的动态长度编码和辅助 GPU 内核实现高吞吐在线解压，避免了在内存受限时迁移部分模型到 CPU。
模型压缩: DFloat11 利用 BFloat16 权重的低熵特性进行熵编码，为不同频率的参数分配动态长度编码，从而在不损失精度的前提下达到近信息最优的体积压缩。

notes: 压缩后可在 8×80GB GPU 单节点上无损推理 Llama 3.1 405B，并在固定显存预算下延长生成长度 5.7–14.9 倍。

general: We introduce our lightweight, all-in-one automated benchmarking framework that allows users to evaluate LLMs on mobile devices.
We focus on evaluating resource efficiency (memory and power consumption) and harmful output for compressed models on mobile devices.

notes: Benchmark/reporting study on compressed LLMs across mobile hardware; no new optimization method that matches any preferred tag.

general: Title: Channel-Aware Mixed-Precision Quantization for Efficient Long-Context Inference
上下文与缓存优化: Abstract: The key-value (KV) cache plays a vital role in accelerating autoregressive inference for large language models (LLMs). However, its linear memory growth with sequence length poses significant memory bottlenecks, especially in long-context scenarios.

notes: The work targets KV cache compression via channel-aware mixed-precision quantization to keep long-context inference feasible.

上下文与缓存优化: KV cache quantization can improve Large Language Models (LLMs) inference throughput and latency in long contexts and large batch-size scenarios while preserving LLMs effectiveness.

notes: 摘要强调通过 KV cache 量化提升 LLM 在长上下文与大 batch 设定下的推理效率，证据直接支持上下文与缓存优化标签。

general: SALS projects the KV cache into a compact latent space via low-rank projection and performs sparse token selection using RoPE-free query--key interactions, reconstructing only a small subset of important tokens to avoid the overhead of full KV cache reconstruction.

Results show SALS achieves 6.4-fold KV cache compression and 5.7-fold speed-up in the attention operator compared to FlashAttention2 on 4K sequences, with 1.4× and 4.5× end-to-end throughput gains over GPT-fast on 4K and 32K sequences respectively.

notes: Framework targets KV cache compression and sparse selection to reduce memory bandwidth during LLM inference, matching the long-context cache optimization preference.

general: proposes Elastic-Cache that jointly decides when to refresh via an attention-aware drift test and where via a depth-aware schedule, enabling adaptive layer-aware KV cache updates for diffusion LLMs to reduce redundancy and accelerate decoding while maintaining generation quality.

notes: Adaptive KV cache refreshes target minimizing redundant computation during diffusion LLM decoding; results show large speedups with preserved accuracy.

模型压缩: Abstract emphasizes ProxSparse, a learning-based framework for semi-structured pruning of pretrained LLMs, transforming mask selection into smooth optimization and outperforming prior mask selection methods.
general: Title and abstract focus on regularized learning of semi-structured sparsity masks explicitly to accelerate LLM serving, highlighting the compression goal.

notes: ProxSparse learns mask selection via regularized optimization, yielding stronger semi-structured pruning results without extra weight updates.
